zh.lifeSummary: 當Jacques de Condé於1203年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德孔代-素-利斯考特時，他的父親Nicolas de Condé33歲，母親Elisabeth de Morialmé14歲。他於1234年與Agnès de Roeulx結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1258年9月14日在法國皮卡迪索姆坎布隆享年55歲，埋葬在比利時納姆爾莫利亞爾梅。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jacques de Condé于1203年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德孔代-素-利斯考特时，他的父亲Nicolas de Condé33岁，母亲Elisabeth de Morialmé14岁。他于1234年与Agnès de Roeulx结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1258年9月14日在法国皮卡迪索姆坎布隆享年55岁，埋葬在比利时納姆爾莫利亞爾梅。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Condé
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Manuel, Luis, Juan, Pedro, Raul, Jorge, Ruben, Angel, Cesar, Fernando.  Portuguese Goncalo, Manoel.
Spanish and Portuguese: nickname from the title of rank conde ‘count’, a derivative of Latin comes, comitis ‘companion’. See Conte .
English (Shropshire): variant of Cundy , a cognate of 3 below, or Cound, a habitational name from Cound in Shropshire.

variants.name: Conte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Mario, Angelo, Salvatore, Antonio, Rocco, Carmine, Pasquale, Luigi, Silvio, Silverio, Giuseppe, Sal, Alfonso, Biagio, Carlo, Emilio, Fernando, Gerardo.

Italian: from the title of rank conte ‘count’, from Latin comes, genitive comitis ‘companion’. Probably in this sense (and in the Late Latin sense of ‘traveling companion’), it was a medieval personal name. As a title it was no doubt applied ironically as a nickname for someone with airs and graces or simply as a metonymic occupational name for someone in the service of a count. Compare Lo Conte .
Spanish: variant of   Conde   ‘count’ (see also 1 above).

variants.name: Candee
meanings: Americanized form of French Condé (see Conde ) or, alternatively, Candé, a habitational name from Candé in Maine-et-Loire, or from Candé-sur-Beauvron in Loire-et-Cher, or southern French Condy .
Alternatively, perhaps an altered form of English Condy , a cognate of the name Candé in 1 above.

History: The Candees trace their origin to Zaccheus Cande(e), who in the middle of the 17th century resided in the New Haven County, CT, and his probable father John Condy alias Conde. The name of the latter is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors as Jean/John Candée/Cande/Condé and in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America as John Conde. See also   Conde  .

nameMeanings.name: Jacques
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of James and Jacob . In French there is no distinction between a form corresponding to Jacob and a form corresponding to James. This is a perennially popular French given name, and Jacques or Jacques Bonhomme has been used (like John Bull in English) as a typification of the ordinary citizen. In Shakespeare's time it was also used as an English name, pronounced ‘jay-kwez’, as in the case of the melancholy character Jacques in As You Like It. Though rarely, if ever, now used in Britain it is found in the United States.

en.lifeSummary: When Jacques de Condé was born in 1203, in Condé-sur-l'Escaut, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Nicolas de Condé, was 33 and his mother, Elisabeth de Morialmé, was 14. He married Agnès de Roeulx in 1234. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 14 September 1258, in Cambron, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 55, and was buried in Morialmé, Namur, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jacques de Condé est né en 1203, à Condé-sur-l'Escaut, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Nicolas de Condé, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de Morialmé, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Agnès de Roeulx en 1234. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 14 septembre 1258, à Cambron, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Morialmé, Namur, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jacques de Condé 1203 in Condé-sur-l'Escaut, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicolas de Condé 33 und seine Mutter Elisabeth de Morialmé 14. Er hat 1234 Agnès de Roeulx geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. September 1258 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Cambron, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Morialmé, Namen, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jacques de Condé è nato il nel 1203 nel Condé-sur-l'Escaut, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Nicolas de Condé, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth de Morialmé, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Agnès de Roeulx nel 1234. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 14 settembre 1258, nel Cambron, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Morialmé, Namur, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Jacques de Condéが1203年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードコンドe-スル-ル'エスカウトで生まれた時，父Nicolas de Condéは33歳，母Elisabeth de Morialméは14歳であった。1234年にAgnès de Roeulxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1258年9月14日にフランスピカーディソンメカンブロンで55歳で死去し，ベルギーナムルモーイアルムeにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jacques de Condé(이)가 1203년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 콘드e-수-'스카트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicolas de Condé(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth de Morialmé(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1234년 Agnès de Roeulx(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1258년 9월 14일 프랑스 피카디 솜 캄브런에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 남어 모리알e에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jacques de Condé nasceu em 1203, em Condé-sur-l'Escaut, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Nicolas de Condé, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de Morialmé, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnès de Roeulx em 1234. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de setembro de 1258, em Cambron, Somme, Picardie, França, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Morialmé, Namur, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jacques de Condé родился в 1203 г. в местности кондe-сур-л'ескаут, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Nicolas de Condé было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de Morialmé, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnès de Roeulx в 1234 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 14 сентября 1258 г. в местности камброн, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности морялмe, намур, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jacques de Condé nació en 1203, en Condé-sur-l'Escaut, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Nicolas de Condé, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de Morialmé, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Agnès de Roeulx en 1234. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de septiembre de 1258, en Cambron, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Morialmé, Namur, Bélgica.
